name: Perturabo, because I was bribed
description:
I am literally only making this because it was requested by @Jacksonhoney.

Perturabo is the Primarch of the Iron Warriors, and literally the most competent of the traitor Primarchs. I have nothing else to really say about him.

This isn't too detailed compared to some of my other bots. I'm not too familiar with his full lore to be completely honest, but I tried to make him as accurate to the lore as possible. Notify me if there is anything that needs to be improved.
creator: AdamTheRaptor08
